reasoning: Tohoku sakura intent. get_spots(Akita) returned generic Akita entities (Akita Museum of Art, Jumonji toll booth, Port Tower Selion, archaeological sites, shrines) with no sakura-tagged filtering. Famed Akita sakura sites (Kakunodate, Hinokinai-gawa) absent. Data is grounded but topic-mismatched.

improvement_hint: Add seasonal_tags ('sakura', 'momiji') and let prefecture queries narrow by theme; surface flagship cherry-blossom sites at top-N.

reasoning: Niigata sake breweries asked. get_local_specialty returned MAFF GI agricultural items (Kurosaki Chamame, Tsunan snow carrots, Oguchi Renkon) — accurate but no sake breweries. Niigata's flagship kura (Hakkaisan, Asahi Shuzo/Kubota, Kikusui, Imayotsukasa) entirely absent.
missing_data: 八海醸造, 朝日酒造, 菊水酒造, 今代司酒造; National Tax Agency 清酒 GI list
improvement_hint: Integrate the National Tax Agency sake GI list and brewery directories so 'sake brewery' queries return brewery entities, not only MAFF agricultural GIs.

reasoning: Hakuba ski + onsen query but only 6 spots returned: Saegusa Art Museum, Goryu Alpine Botanical Garden, plus municipal admin pages ('観光課', '観光商工係', UN Tourism announcement). No Happo-One/Goryu/Iwatake ski resorts or Happo onsen surfaced.

reasoning: Kansai autumn-foliage query. get_spots(Kyoto) returned generic Kyoto items (steam locomotive museum, Nagaoka-kyo ruins, modern art museum, Sennyu-ji, Fushimi Momoyama tomb, Nishikyogoku sports park). Famous momiji sites (Tofukuji, Eikando, Arashiyama) not surfaced; Kansai = multi-prefecture ignored.

improvement_hint: Add momiji/sakura seasonal tags and support region (Kansai) fan-out across constituent prefectures.

reasoning: Arabic query for Kansai sakura. get_spots(Nara) returned generic Nara entities (Takamatsuzuka kofun, Todai-ji Daibutsu, etc.). Yoshinoyama — the canonical Kansai sakura site — absent. No Arabic localization fields.
missing_data: 吉野山 (Yoshinoyama), 又兵衛桜, 氷室神社; ar localization

reasoning: Stargazing on Okinawa remote islands. Returned mainland castles, German village, parks; no Hateruma (Japan's southernmost certified Dark Sky), Iriomote-Ishigaki Dark Sky park, or Ishigaki astronomy facility. '離島' (remote island) constraint ignored.
missing_data: 波照間島, 西表石垣国立公園 (国際ダークスカイ協会認定), 石垣島天文台
improvement_hint: Index Dark Sky designated areas as a facet and allow island_type=remote filter so remote-island queries don't dilute with Naha results.

reasoning: Thai query for rural Hokkaido onsen ryokan. Returned urban Sapporo/Kushiro hotels (ANA Holiday Inn, Crowne Plaza) and Niseko apartments — no rural onsen ryokan. lodging_type=onsen_ryokan filter not applied.
missing_data: Noboribetsu, Jozankei, Sounkyo, Niseko Konbu Onsen ryokan inventory
improvement_hint: Support lodging_type=onsen_ryokan and rural/urban classification (population density) so 'rural onsen' queries don't return business hotels in the prefectural capital.

reasoning: Vietnamese query for Seto Inland Sea islands. Kagawa response includes Naoshima art museums (Lee Ufan, Chichu) — relevant — plus Ritsurin/Takamatsu Castle (mainland) and Shodoshima Angel Road. Teshima, Megijima, Ogijima not surfaced; Hiroshima/Okayama Setouchi islands missing.
missing_data: 豊島美術館, 直島本村, 男木島/女木島, Hiroshima/Okayama Setouchi islands
improvement_hint: Add region:Setouchi multi-prefecture aggregation and an island_flag so island-focused queries surface insular spots only.

reasoning: Tokushima 藍染 workshops. METI returned 阿波正藍しじら織 and 阿波和紙 — both relevant indigo-related designations — plus Otani Ware. But no visitable workshop venues (アイの館, Buaisou Studio, 藍住町歴史館). Designation list ≠ workshops.
missing_data: アイの館, Buaisou Studio, 藍住町歴史館 — visitable workshop venues
improvement_hint: Cross-link MAFF/METI craft designations with municipal-scraped workshop/museum pages so users get visitable venues, not only the designation metadata.

reasoning: German query for Koyasan shukubo (temple lodging). Returned Wakayama hotels (Kii Tanabe business hotel, Kushimoto, Marriott Shirahama) — none on Mt Koya. Shukubo (52 temples) entirely missing/unfiltered.
missing_data: 高野山 52 shukubo (恵光院, 一乗院, 福智院 etc.); lodging_type=shukubo
improvement_hint: Add lodging_type=shukubo and seed Koyasan temple-stay properties from official Koyasan tourism data.

reasoning: search_area('武家屋敷') returned 87 matches (chrome-filter dropped 5 vs iter11): Wikidata Buke Yashiki entity surfaces, plus Shimane, Fukui (Uchiyama), Aizu Bukeyashiki (Fukushima), Kanazawa Nagamachi — strong off-Kyoto coverage. Cleaner result list, but municipal_scrape narratives still verbose.
missing_data: Better dedup; structured city/era fields per district
improvement_hint: Truncate municipal_scrape descriptions to lead paragraph and add structured fields (samurai_district, era, status) so agent can rank cleanly.

reasoning: Indonesian query for Akita summer festivals. Returned Dainichido Bugaku, Kakunodate, Tsuchizaki Shinmei (summer, July) — relevant — but Akita Kanto Matsuri (top-3 Tohoku flagship summer festival) absent. national_heritage list pads with non-Akita items.
missing_data: 秋田竿燈まつり, 西馬音内盆踊り, 大曲花火 — flagship summer festivals

reasoning: Korean query for small fishing port towns in San'in. Returned generic Shimane spots (castles, museums, Izumo Taisha, Iwami Ginzan). No fishing villages like Mihonoseki, Karakawa, Hamada port. '漁港 / 항구마을' constraint ignored.
missing_data: 美保関, 唐川, 仁摩, 浜田漁港 fishing villages
improvement_hint: Add place_type tag (fishing_port, mining_town) so port/village queries don't return major shrines and museums.

reasoning: Gifu washi query. METI returned 9 craft items including Mino Ware ceramics, Hidehira-nuri lacquer, etc. Mino Washi designation likely present; correct designations but no workshop venues for hands-on washi-making.
missing_data: 美濃和紙の里会館 workshop venue; explicit washi-making experience locations

reasoning: Spanish query for fishing villages in Noto Peninsula. Returned mostly Kanazawa-city items (museums, Kenrokuen, Oyama Shrine) — Kanazawa is south of Noto. Only Nanao Castle and Keta Shrine touch Noto. No fishing villages.
missing_data: 輪島, 珠洲, 蛸島, 舳倉島 漁村; Noto-area place_type=fishing_village
improvement_hint: Allow sub-prefecture filtering by peninsula/region (region=Noto) so Kanazawa central spots don't dominate when user asks about Noto.

reasoning: search_area('砂丘') returned 80 matches (chrome-filter dropped 4 vs iter11). Top hits still Tottori-centric (the very thing user asked to exclude). Other dunes (中田島, 庄内, 吹上浜, 猿ヶ森) buried or absent. Slightly cleaner output overall.
missing_data: 中田島砂丘 (静岡), 庄内砂丘 (山形), 吹上浜 (鹿児島), 猿ヶ森砂丘 (青森)
improvement_hint: Implement query exclusion ('not Tottori') and rank lesser-known matches above tourism-portal landing pages; add a dune entity index from Wikidata.

reasoning: Chinese query for traditional crafts in San'in/Shimane. METI returned 4 designated crafts: 石見焼, 石州和紙, 雲州そろばん, 出雲石燈ろう — all bona fide Shimane crafts with high-confidence Chinese translations. Solid, on-intent.
missing_data: Could include Tottori (the other San'in prefecture) co-coverage

reasoning: Lavender beyond Furano. Returned beer museum, art parks, clock tower, Shikisai-no-Oka (relevant Biei flower farm), Hakodate museums, Kushiro wetland. reasoning: Filipino query likely for 伝統的な町並み (traditional townscapes) in Kyushu. Returned Oita amusement-park items (Rakutenchi, African Safari, Funai Castle, Marine Palace) — neither old townscapes nor coffee. Yufuin/Beppu old streetscapes and Hita Mameda 重伝建 absent.

reasoning: Hokuriku 古民家 lodging asked. Returned student housing, AB Hotel, ANA Crowne Plaza Kanazawa, 'Kanaya' guest house — generic urban lodging, no kominka. Many entries lack proper names ('Student housing 1').

reasoning: Kii Peninsula mountain shrines via get_japan_heritage(Wakayama). reasoning: Sea of Japan summer fireworks. get_festivals(Niigata) returned count=0 prefecture items, only national_heritage list of unrelated festivals (Kawagoe Hikawa, Ueno Tenjin, Kamezaki Shiohi). Major hanabi (Nagaoka, Kashiwazaki) entirely missing.

reasoning: Oita traditional bamboo crafts. METI returned 別府竹細工 (Beppu Bamboo Crafts) — exactly the canonical answer — plus 博多織 (cross-listed via Oita). Description, materials, eight techniques all correct. Solid on-intent answer.

reasoning: Cycling routes through rural Shikoku. Returned Ehime spots (Imabari Castle, Ashizuri-Uwakai NP, museums, Dogo Park, Shimonada Station). Shimanami Kaido — the world-famous Imabari cycling route — not surfaced as a route entity, just Imabari Castle.
missing_data: しまなみ海道, とびしま海道, 四国一周サイクリング route entities

reasoning: Kabuki outside Tokyo/Kyoto. get_traditional_arts returned 183 items — Nogaku, festivals, Yobuko Otsunahiki etc. — but no keyword filter for kabuki. Konpira Kabuki (金丸座), Aizu Tanagura Kabuki, regional ji-kabuki venues likely buried in 183.
